_comment: Permanent CCRL-anchor config. Opponents are FIXED at their published CCRL ratings (read from the official computerchess.org.uk list at the /4040/ path, which CCRL now brands 'CCRL 40/15'); the rig solves only for IxEngine. Re-run after any upgrade: python tools/anchor/run_anchor.py (or run_anchor.bat). Keep opponents/anchors/conditions stable so runs stay comparable. Paths are relative to the engine root. All anchor ratings are 1-CPU figures, matching IxEngine at Threads=1.
